A2: What Did You Do on

Source topic: Spring Vacation Conversation Lesson Create a practical English speaking lesson about the question: What did you do on...

Spring Vacation Conversation Lesson Create a practical English speaking lesson about the question: What did you do on your spring vacation? Target learner: adult learner at uppe...

Setting the Scene

The Conversation

Situation 1

Order lunch

Friend A

I

Continue The Conversation

Tell your vacation story

Continue as You.

Answer as yourself. Give a simple vacation answer with where you went or if you stayed home, and add one more real detail.

Tip: A natural answer can include where, who, one activity, and one small weather or food detail.

Show starter phrases
  • On my vacation, I...
  • I went to... with...
  • I stayed home and...
  • The weather was..., so we...
  • I ate... and...
Show one model reply

On my vacation, I went to Busan with my sister. We stayed near the beach, and the weather was cool at first.

More acceptable replies
  • I stayed home and rested, but I also went out for dinner with my family.
  • I went to another city with my cousin and ate a lot of good food.

Continue The Conversation

Build your full answer

Continue as You.

Give one full answer in 3 to 5 short parts so your partner can really picture your vacation.

Tip: A strong answer often includes where, who, what, one weather or food detail, and one best part or problem.

Show starter phrases
  • On my vacation, I...
  • I went to... with...
  • I stayed home and...
  • The weather was..., so we...
  • I ate... and...
  • The best part was...
Show one model reply

On my vacation, I went to Busan with my sister. We stayed for three nights, and the best part was walking by the sea.

More acceptable replies
  • I stayed home and rested, but I also went out for dinner with my family.
  • During my vacation, I visited my grandparents and ate a lot of good food.

Check your understanding

?

What did the people see at the fish market?

You can start like this: They saw ...

Talk together

They compare simple food options, prices, and drinks before ordering.

What food do you like in a mall?

Start like this:I like...

Situation 2

Search the bedroom

Continue The Conversation

Share the best part and one problem

Continue as You.

Answer as yourself. Say the best part of the vacation and add one small problem or tired moment.

Tip: Real answers often sound better when they include both a good moment and one honest difficulty.

Show starter phrases
  • The best part was...
  • One difficult thing was...
  • I liked it because...
  • After that, I rested and...
Show one model reply

The best part was the view near the sea, but one difficult thing was waiting a long time for dinner.

More acceptable replies
  • I liked the quiet evening most, but the train station was very busy.
  • The best part was being with my family, and the only problem was the rain.

Check your understanding

?

How long did Hana and her sister wait for a dinner table?

You can start like this: They waited ...

Talk together

They look around the bedroom and say where the missing things are.

Have you looked for a missing thing in your room before?

Start like this:I usually keep it...

Continue The Conversation

Practice different vacation answers

Continue as You.

Choose one version that fits you, like a trip answer, a stay-home answer, or a rainy-day answer, and say it out loud.

Tip: You do not need a big trip story. A simple home answer or rainy-day answer is also natural.

Show starter phrases
  • During my vacation, I...
  • I stayed home and...
  • It was rainy, so I...
  • The best part was...
Show one model reply

During my vacation, I stayed home and rested. It was rainy, so I read a book and cooked with my family.

More acceptable replies
  • During my vacation, I went to Busan with my sister and ate local food.
  • I stayed home and watched movies because the weather was bad.

Check your understanding

?

What phrase can we use to start a sentence about a vacation?

You can start like this: We can say ...

Talk together

They look around the bedroom and say where the missing things are.

Is it easy to keep your room tidy?

Start like this:I usually keep it...

Situation 4

Decide what to do next

Friend A

Friend B

I I

Friend A

Friend B

I I 3

Friend A

a

Friend B

I I I I I

Friend A

Continue The Conversation

Talk about your next vacation

Continue as You.

Answer as yourself. Say where you want to go next time and what you want to do there.

Tip: Add one place and one simple reason or activity.

Show starter phrases
  • Next time, I want to...
  • On my next vacation, I want to...
  • I hope to...
Show one model reply

Next time, I want to visit Jeju Island because I want to see the sea and take photos.

More acceptable replies
  • On my next vacation, I want to stay home and really rest.
  • I hope to visit a new city and eat local food there.

Continue The Conversation

Ask your partner back

Continue as You.

Choose one open question, ask your partner, then listen carefully and ask one short follow-up question.

Tip: Open questions with what, where, who, or why usually create longer answers.

Show starter phrases
  • What did you do on your last vacation?
  • Did you go somewhere or stay home on your last vacation?
  • Do people usually travel or stay close to home during spring vacation where you live?
  • What is the best part of a good vacation for you?
  • Did anything feel difficult on your last vacation?
Show one model reply

How about you?

More acceptable replies
  • How about you? What was the best part of your vacation?
  • Where did you go, and who did you go with?

Continue The Conversation

Add one more detail

Continue as You.

After your first answer, add one more feeling, problem, food detail, or future plan to keep the conversation going.

Tip: Even one extra detail makes your answer sound more natural and less like a test reply.

Show starter phrases
  • The best part was...
  • I liked it because...
  • One difficult thing was...
  • The weather was...
  • Next time, I want to...
Show one model reply

The best part was the evening walk, and next time I want to stay longer.

More acceptable replies
  • I liked it because I could really relax.
  • One difficult thing was the rain, but the cafe was nice.

Check your understanding

?

What was the best part of the vacation?

You can start like this: The best part was ...

Talk together

They make one final plan after finishing the main shopping tasks.

What do you do after shopping?

Start like this:After shopping, I...

What is one simple first sentence you can say about your spring vacation?

Check your understanding

?

Did Maya have a busy vacation or a quiet one?

?

What follow-up question could you ask after someone says, I went with my sister?

Check your understanding

?

Which answer sounds more natural for a vacation story?

Check your understanding

?

What will you probably say next time if the weather is rainy?
